description: Located within Yuexiu Park, Zhenhai Tower showcases over 2,000 years of Guangzhou's urban development history.
Take a boat tour along the Pearl River to enjoy the night views of both banks, featuring Guangzhou's modern cityscape and historical architecture.
A large commemorative building dedicated to Dr. Sun Yat-sen, a masterpiece of modern Chinese architecture.
A typical Xiguan mansion showcasing traditional Xiguan folk culture and lifestyle.
A well-known shopping center in Guangzhou, featuring numerous brands and gourmet options, offering an excellent shopping experience.
The largest comprehensive museum in South China, housing Guangdong's historical artifacts and natural specimens.
A large urban square located on Guangzhou's new city axis, serving as the core landscape area of the CBD.
Guangzhou's most distinctive arcade-style commercial street, a hub for traditional Cantonese cuisine.

attraction_name: Museum of the Nanyue King (Palace Exhibition Area)
description: Showcasing the site of the Nanyue Kingdom Palace from over 2,000 years ago, an important testament to Guangzhou's city-building history.

attraction_name: Guangdong Museum of Art (Ersha Island Exhibition Area)
description: A major art exhibition institution in South China, regularly hosting contemporary art exhibitions.
